# QoF v1.2.1's Changelog

> [!NOTE]
> A Minecraft Bedrock addon that adds small vanilla-friendly features. Each module is configurable through the in-game pack settings panel. Requires **BetaAPIs** enabled under Experiments.

## Pack Info

Full changelog: [v1.2.1](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/commits/v1.2.1) or [compare](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/compare/v1.2.0...v1.2.1) Releases: [v1.2.1](https://github.com/aitji/QoF/releases/tag/v1.2.1) LICENSE: [MIT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/aitji/QoF/refs/heads/main/LICENSE)\
Release Date: [Mar/19/2026 (10:03:05)](https://time.is/Unix_time_converter/1773914585)

Base Game Version: [26.3](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/articles/43861703542925-Minecraft-Bedrock-Edition-26-3-Changelog)\
Dependency: [2.6.0@beta](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@minecraft/server/v/2.6.0-beta.1.26.3-stable)

## Changelogs

## Bug Fixes
- Wrapped `debug message` on startup to `DEBUG` mode
- Removed `debug message` from Dynamic Light
- Fixed some `technical debt` in `config.js` that might lead to misunderstandings in the future
- Fixed a bug in `Carried Container` where player jump was not correctly set to `true` when hitting an edge case
